title: cleyera japonica var. morii
intro: Cleyera japonica var. morii, also known as the Japanese Cleyera or 'Moonlight' Cleyera, is a variegated evergreen shrub native to Japan, characterized by its striking white and green leaf patterns. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. In traditional medicine, the plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and promoting overall well-being. Cleyera japonica var. morii can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote healing.
